parsed.availability_comment: Retained in GT's 2026 squad and no current adverse report found; availability appears better than XI certainty.
parsed.availability_note: No recent injury/suspension report found, but age/workload could still limit usage across a full season.
parsed.followup_reason: No official 2026 XI evidence yet; opener-phase usage versus GT's deeper first-choice seam options remains inferred.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: No overseas-slot issue; selection pressure comes from Siraj/Prasidh plus other fast-bowling options.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Domestic player; overseas-slot cap does not affect him. Competition is from GT's Indian and overall seam depth.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: Retained veteran seamer, but GT's preferred pace core appears Siraj-Prasidh-Rabada with backup competition from Arshad/Gurnoor/Ashok/Luke Wood; Ishant looks like conditions-based rotation/impact depth.
